overall.description: First-person exploration of a desert landscape at golden hour, featuring geothermal geysers and rocky cliff formations. The player approaches and observes an erupting geyser before continuing through the sandy terrain toward distant geothermal activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert valley with geothermal geyser in distance

events.description: geyser eruption intensifies with visible water column and steam

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through desert terrain toward an erupting geothermal geyser

entered.detail: large layered rock cliff face forming the right boundary of the valley
active geothermal vent emitting steam and water column
sandy desert ground with rippled texture
scattered dry bushes and small plants across the dunes

segments.scene_description: The player traverses a wide desert valley during golden hour, approaching an active geothermal geyser in the distance. Rocky cliffs line the right side while sparse vegetation dots the sandy terrain. The geyser's eruption intensifies as the player draws closer.

scene_state.functional_zone: geothermal pool with active water eruption

events.description: reaches the geyser pool and slows to observe the eruption up close
moves past the geyser and transitions into open desert beyond

agents.ego_description: approaching the erupting geyser pool, observing the water column up close, then circling past it

entered.detail: circular pool of water at the base of the erupting geyser with rippling surface

segments.scene_description: The player arrives at the geothermal geyser, observing the powerful water eruption and circular pool up close. After circling the feature, the player continues past it into the open desert, leaving the geyser behind as the rocky cliffs recede into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert with distant geothermal activity

agents.ego_description: trekking through open desert terrain toward distant geothermal formations on the horizon

entered.detail: multiple geothermal vents visible on the horizon emitting steam
small boulders and rock formations scattered across the sand

segments.scene_description: The player moves through the expansive open desert, leaving the main geyser behind. The terrain features scattered rocks and sparse vegetation, with multiple distant geysers visible on the horizon against the backdrop of layered rock cliffs. The golden hour lighting casts long shadows across the sandy landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey across a desert valley that transitions from a focused encounter with a single geyser to a wide-angle view of a geothermal wasteland. It begins with a steady approach through sandy terrain and sparse vegetation, moving toward an intensifying eruption while rocky cliffs line the right side of the frame. As the camera reaches the geothermal feature, it circles the powerful water eruption and its surrounding pool before pushing forward into the open expanse. The scene then expands as the initial geyser and cliffs recede, shifting the focus toward a vast horizon dotted with multiple distant eruptions. Finally, the camera glides through the scattered rocks of the open desert, where the golden hour lighting casts long, dramatic shadows across the layered cliff backdrop.
